prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - maximize carbohydrate loading and sustained energy for 4000+ calorie daily intake

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 4000+ calories with emphasis on complex carbohydrates (at least 60% of calories)
Includes 5-6 eating occasions distributed throughout the day for sustained energy
All meals and snacks are compact and concise (brief descriptions, not elaborate recipes)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a asingle athelete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 4000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and sustained energy

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle gain and strength performance for weightlifting competition in 2 weeks

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories for the day
Protein intake is at least 180g (2g per kg body weight) distributed across meals for muscle recovery
Includes pre and post-workout nutrition timing around strength training sessions
Plan is compact and covers only 1 day with clear meal structure
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a asingle athelete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on protein intake and muscle recovery timing

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for soccer match with 2500 calorie target and balanced macronutrients

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 2500 calories with balanced macros (carbs 45-50%, protein 20-25%, fat 25-30%)
Includes pre-match, match, and post-match nutrition timing with hydration strategy
All meals and snacks are dairy-free and practical for a single day
Compact format with 4-6 eating occasions clearly structured
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a asingle athelete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (soccer player) requiring balanced macros around 2500 calories with consideration for hydration and pre/post-match nutrition windows
